---
name: Scenario request
about: Request or propose a new PM Copilot example scenario
title: "[Scenario]: "
labels: scenario
assignees: ""
---

## Scenario name

Example: checkout-coupon-redesign

## Platform

- Web
- H5
- App
- Mini Program
- Cross-platform

## Raw request

Write the realistic ambiguous product request.

## Product area

Example: checkout, onboarding, retention, admin, booking, content.

## Required artifacts

- PRD
- Metrics tree
- Tracking plan
- User flow
- Prototype
- Review checklist
- Final package

## Sensitive data note

Use synthetic or anonymized data only.
